Description: Free-tier eligible. Change to t2.micro only if deploying in a region where t3 is unavailable.
SSM path — auto-resolves to the latest Windows Server 2022 AMI in the deployment region. No change needed.
Lab VPC CIDR. Change only if this range conflicts with an existing VPC in the account.
Must be a subset of VpcCIDR.
REQUIRED — Set to the CloudLabs platform egress IP range (e.g. 203.0.113.0/24). Controls who can reach the VM over RDP (3389), HTTP (80), and HTTPS (443). Never leave as 0.0.0.0/0 in production.
REQUIRED — Must match RDPAllowedCIDR. Scopes the IGW route to avoid NO_UNRESTRICTED_ROUTE_TO_IGW guard rule violation. Use the same CloudLabs egress CIDR.
Local Windows administrator account created on the jump VM. Shown to students on the CloudLabs environment page.

REQUIRED — Full SSM Parameter Store path (SecureString) where CloudLabs pre-writes the VM admin password before stack deploy. Example: /cloudlabs/iam-lab/vm-admin-password. Must exist in SSM before deployment.
Tag value applied to all lab resources. CloudLabs uses this for cost attribution and cleanup scoping.
IAM username created for the student's AWS Console login. Must be unique within the account.

REQUIRED — Full SSM Parameter Store path (SecureString) where CloudLabs pre-writes the IAM console user password before stack deploy. Example: /cloudlabs/iam-lab/console-password. Must exist in SSM before deployment.
